            }

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        var collapsibles = document.querySelectorAll(".hvelp-debug-collapsible");
        collapsibles.forEach(function(collapsible) {
            var content = collapsible.querySelector("pre");
            content.style.display = "none"; // Initially hide content
            var arrow = collapsible.querySelector(".hvelp-debug-collapsible-arrow");
            arrow.classList.add("collapsed"); // Initially set arrow as collapsed

            collapsible.addEventListener("click", function() {
                if (content.style.display === "none") {
                    content.style.display = "block";
                    arrow.classList.remove("collapsed");
                } else {
                    content.style.display = "none";
                    arrow.classList.add("collapsed");
                }
            });
        });
    });
